title: Interconnecting Black & Terracotta Trio Strawberry Planters Stackable Lightweight Garden Plant Pots (BLACK, 3 Strawberry Planters (Trio 3 Pot))
features: Size/Dimension: 35cm x 35cm x 13cm (14" x 14" x 5") Approx.
Available in black and terracotta these planters feature an interconnecting design which allows you to stack the plant pots to create beautiful displays in your gardens.
Trio strawberry plant pots are perfect for gardens where space is restricted these planters are perfect for strawberries, herbs and bedding plants.
Made from durable lightweight plastic makes these plant pots easy to carry and transport around to create different displays around your home and garden.

Plant pots are designed to allow you to showcase your plants and flowers and create beautiful displays. The plant pots are weather resistant which makes them ideal for outdoor settings, the planter design is stable and robust enough for numerous levels. Just ensure that the ground level surface is flat and level.
description: Our strawberry trio planters feature an interconnecting design which allows you to stack the plant pots to create beautiful displays in your gardens. The planters are available in black and terracotta, these lightweight pots are perfect for gardens where space maybe restricted.
